description_long: This is a freestanding wooden shelving unit with a modern, geometric design featuring three main horizontal surfaces. The structure is composed of a wood grain finish with alternating dark and light brown stripes, giving it a visually striking appearance. The front face includes a row of small hooks or pegs beneath the middle shelf, suitable for hanging keys or small items. The sides reveal the open, stepped construction of the shelves, with no visible doors or enclosed compartments. The back is a solid wood panel, providing stability and a clean look. The overall build suggests it is intended for use as an entryway organizer, display shelf, or utility storage in urban environments.
description: A modern, striped wooden shelving unit with three open shelves and a row of hooks beneath the middle shelf. The design features alternating wood tones and a solid back panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves, alternating wood stripes, and a row of hooks beneath the middle shelf.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the stepped, open shelf design and the depth of each shelf.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid wood panel with a continuous grain pattern and no openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the stepped shelves and the hooks beneath the middle shelf.
